title: Chemically competent E. coli cells
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"1eish","text":"This protocol describes how to make chemically competent Escherichia coli cell.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":57,"length":16}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]},{"key":"b0f9h","text":"For the protocol E. coli strain NEB Tubo was taken.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"italic","offset":17,"length":7}],"entityRanges":[],"data":[]}],"entityMap":{}}

steps: Grow 50ml over night culture in TYM medium
Resuspend pellets in 100ml ice cold TfB1 buffer
Resuspend pellets in 30ml ice cold TfB2 buffer
Aliquot the cells into chilled tubes (50µl aliquots)
Freeze the cells in liquid nitrogen
creator: Carlos H
